summary: PR 2286 implements grZebesRoute_8020B260 in the Zebes Route stage source, adds the associated StageCallbacks table, includes the baselib/ground display headers needed by the implementation, and updates the header prototype from void to HSD_GObj*. The bot report shows grZebesRoute_8020B260 improved from 0.00% to 99.97%, with related .data progress, but the loaded evidence does not show a full 100% match for this target.

key_files.role: Adds StageCallbacks grZe_Route_803E5DB0, implements grZebesRoute_8020B260, and adds required includes for grdisplay, gobj gx link, and gobj proc APIs.
Updates public prototype for grZebesRoute_8020B260 from void return to HSD_GObj*.

what_changed: Added #include "gr/grdisplay.h", <baselib/gobjgxlink.h>, and <baselib/gobjproc.h> to support grZebesRoute_8020B260 calls.
Added global StageCallbacks grZe_Route_803E5DB0 with three populated callback rows and a NULL sentinel row.

Implemented grZebesRoute_8020B260(int gobj_id) to create/get a ground GObj with Ground_801C14D0, clear Ground callback fields x8_callback and xC_callback, set up GX link with grDisplay_801C5DB0, install callback3 into x1C_callback when present, invoke callback0 when present, and attach callback2 as an HSD GObj proc when present.
Added OSReport fallback when Ground_801C14D0 returns NULL.
Changed grZebesRoute_8020B260 header declaration from void grZebesRoute_8020B260(int) to HSD_GObj* grZebesRoute_8020B260(int).
Removed an existing decomp marker comment for grZebesRoute_8020B1F4 in the same source file.

smart_moves.text: The implementation uses typed Ground and HSD_GObj fields and APIs instead of raw pointer arithmetic for the object setup path.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: Ground* gp = gobj->user_data; gp->x8_callback/xC_callback/x1C_callback; GObj_SetupGXLink; HSD_GObjProc_8038FD54

smart_moves.text: The header prototype was updated to match the recovered function body returning HSD_GObj*.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grzebesroute.h prototype changed to HSD_GObj*

smart_moves.text: Callback dispatch is expressed through a StageCallbacks table indexed by gobj_id, which keeps callback roles visible instead of inlining address-style dispatch.

decomp_lessons.lesson: When recovering a stage GObj creation/setup helper, check whether the function both returns the created HSD_GObj* and requires the owning header prototype to be corrected.
Stage setup functions may match by using a StageCallbacks table plus conditional callback installation/invocation rather than raw branch-only logic.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: conditional callback3, callback0, callback2 handling in grZebesRoute_8020B260

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Add the stage callback table in the same translation unit before implementing the function that indexes it.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The bot report shows data progress but does not prove broader data ownership beyond this PR slice.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use real project APIs and includes for GObj setup and proc attachment instead of undeclared calls or local prototypes.
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: No require-protos or build log is present in the loaded evidence.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Keep the raw OSReport call when the recovered source appears to report failed Ground_801C14D0 creation with file, line, and gobj_id.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: OSReport("%s:%d: couldn t get gobj(id=%d)\n", __FILE__, 197, gobj_id)
assembly_or_matching_tactics.caveat: The PR evidence does not discuss whether this could or should be an assert/report macro.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Stage GObj setup helpers may require return-type recovery in headers
accepted_candidate_records.text: In PR 2286, grZebesRoute_8020B260 was implemented as returning HSD_GObj*, and the owning header prototype was updated from void to HSD_GObj*. This is a concrete example of matching work where recovering the body also proves the header signature.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: grzebesroute.h prototype changed to HSD_GObj*
